channel.title: Webgl on Himalaya's Dev Journal
channel.description: Recent content in Webgl on Himalaya's Dev Journal

item.title: NoiseGen — Procedural Texture Library
item.description: A TypeScript library for generating procedural textures using Perlin noise, Worley noise, and fractal Brownian motion.

item.title: Optimizing WebGL Rendering for Mobile
item.description: Frametimes, draw calls, and texture atlases — how I got my game to run smoothly on a phone.
